channel.title: XDS on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in XDS on Mizubikes

item.title: Finding an E-Bike for My Wife (And Not Overthinking It)
item.description: How a cyclist who knows too much about bikes shopped for one his wife would actually ride.

item.title: The Factory Always Wins: Why XDS Selling Its Own Bikes Isn't New — It's Just Giant's Playbook
item.description: XDS making bikes for the industry and then selling its own is raising eyebrows. But this story is as old as the bike industry itself — and Giant wrote the original.

item.title: XDS X-Lab: The Chinese Brand Racing in the WorldTour (And Now Selling to You)
item.description: XDS just launched X-Lab globally with nine bikes, including the AD9 WorldTour racer. Here's what they offer, what they cost, and whether they're worth your attention.
